title: Boulangerie | 1.21 [Fabric]
description: Despite its funny-sounding name in Romanian, the Modpack aims to overhaul vanilla Minecraft by adding only vanilla friendly mods!
body:
This modpack aims to overhaul vanilla Minecraft by adding only vanilla friendly mods that blend seamlessly with the base game, ensuring that the core Minecraft experience remains intact while being enriched with new content. **(!)** A little history behind my Project's name: When people first encounter the name of my modpack, they often assume it's just a quirky choice. However, there's a fun story behind it that's worth sharing. The word "Boulangerie" which is a French word (that translates to bakery), holds an amusing similarity to the Romanian word "bul-a-ngiu", which roughly translates to "fag"... ikr? Expect subtle enhancements that give new life onto the world you know and love, from expanded biomes and refined structures to more diverse mob behavior and fresh crafting possibilities. This modpack focuses on improving the world generation, introducing new yet familiar landscapes that offer fresh exploration opportunities without compromising the classic Minecraft aesthetic. This.. is Minecraft as you know it — just better. Dive in head first and experience the game with a renewed sense of wonder, whether you are a veteran or just stepping into the game as a new player, I can confidently say that this modpack is designed to deliver a truly pleasant and immersive experience tailored for everyone!
Spoiler The modpacks beautiful text seen in the icon has been created on this website: Font generator
